title: The Difference Between Writing About Tech and Writing With It
excerpt: Most 'technical writers' are translators after the fact. The good ones are in the room while the thing is still being decided. Here's what changes when you move earlier.

title: Ghostwriting for Founders: What Actually Transfers
excerpt: You can't ghostwrite a voice you've never heard. A breakdown of the intake process that makes a founder's posts sound like them on their best day, not like me.

title: Why Most Web3 Content Fails Before the First Sentence
excerpt: It's rarely a writing problem. It's an audience problem — trying to speak to holders, builders, and total newcomers in the same 600 words.

title: A Content Strategy Template for Pre-Seed Startups
excerpt: You don't need a content calendar yet. You need three assets that do specific jobs. Here's the exact list I hand to early-stage founders.
